_note: Channel manifest for recursive.eco. Makes this repo self-describing: recursive.eco imports it as a channel by reading this file from raw.githubusercontent.com/PlayfulProcess/kali-paradevi/main/recursive-eco.json. Declares the channel identity (rendered as a channel-document, document_data.is_channel=true), where its grammars live (grammars/<slug>/grammar.json), and the slug->UUID map (ids.json). Membership lives in `tools` (channel_slug). Mirrors recursive-tarot/recursive-eco.json. See recursive-eco/docs/DESIGN-import-channel-from-github.md.

channel.name: Kali · Paradevi — The Objective Sky
channel.description: A symbolic system built on real astronomy — black holes and galaxies as a paired mirror-deck, two faces of one body. The facts are science; the meaning is yours to make. Reflective, never predictive.

hero.title: Kali · Paradevi
hero.subtitle: A mirror made of the actual sky — the dark face (black holes, voids) and the light face (galaxies, radiance), each the emanation of the other.
hero.body_md:
Where inherited astrology asks the sky to predict you, this system asks the sky to reflect you. Every card is a real object — a black hole with a catalog number, a galaxy with a measured distance — carrying a reflective layer on top of verified astronomy.

Kali and Paradevi are two sides of the same coin: flip the card, and the void shows you its radiance; flip it back, and the radiance shows you its void. Built in the open and bound to its GitHub repo.
